headline: Halliburton (HAL) Signs Digital Transformation Deal with Pampa Energia
summary: Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) is one of the 7 Best Turnaround Stocks to Buy in 2026. On June 9, 2026, Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) entered into a multi-year agreement with Pampa Energia to support the digital transformation of its operations in Vaca Muerta. Halliburton said the agreement supports Pampa Energia’s strategy to “scale efficiently, strengthen decision-making, and […]
